global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with various graphic elements and text promoting trending content.

elements.label: Orange gradient background
elements.description: A vibrant orange gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Circular graphic element
elements.description: A large circular graphic element in the center, with a smooth, rounded shape.

elements.label: Rectangular graphic element
elements.description: A rectangular graphic element overlapping the circular one, featuring soft edges.

elements.label: Irregular shape
elements.description: An irregularly shaped graphic element positioned centrally, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Additional rectangular element
elements.description: Another rectangular graphic element, similar in style to the previous ones.

elements.label: Small icon
elements.description: A small icon located at the top left, featuring a simple design.

elements.label: Trending text
elements.description: Text in a bold font stating 'Watch what's trending', positioned towards the bottom.

elements.label: New hits text
elements.description: Text below the trending message that reads 'New hits every week', in a smaller font.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom with the text 'Watch now', designed to attract clicks.

elements.label: NeonCast logo
elements.description: The logo 'NeonCast UGC' displayed prominently at the top, in a bold and modern font.

elements.label: Additional graphic element
elements.description: A smaller graphic element that adds to the overall design but is not clearly defined.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The main headline 'NeonCast UGC' in a large, eye-catching font at the top.

elements.label: Trending message
elements.description: Text that communicates the trending nature of the content, positioned centrally.
elements.text_content: Watch what's trending New hits every week

elements.label: Watch now button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom with the text 'Watch now', inviting user interaction.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, rewarded_video, bright and modern, NeonCast UGC, trending content.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, main subjects are centered, and the CTA buttons are at the bottom.
